---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

## Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Run command '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

## Error Logs
Please add error logs (screenshot or pasted text) to help diagnose the problem, eg. Discord error embeds, console error logs

## Environment
- **Deployment Method**: [Self-hosted with Bun / Self-hosted with Docker / Official hosted instance]

If Self-Hosted, state the following as well:
- **TomoriBot Version**: [e.g., v1.0.0 or commit hash]
- **OS**: [e.g., Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14]

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here, such as:
- Does this happen consistently or intermittently?
- Did this work before? If so, when did it break?
